name: SP_BARKODCOZ_EAN128
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SP_BARKODCOZ_EAN128] 	@BRK 		NVARCHAR(50)
	
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON


			DECLARE @BARKOD		AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @TAKIP_NO	AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @URTARIHI	AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @SKTARIHI	AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @ALAN1		AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @A1			AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @A2			AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @A3			AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @A4			AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @A5			AS NVARCHAR(50)
			DECLARE @strx		AS NVARCHAR(200)


			SET @A1=CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(01)',@BRK)) =0 THEN '' ELSE  (SELECT SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(01)',@BRK)+4,CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(01)',@BRK)+4,200))) > 0 THEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(01)',@BRK)+4,200))) -1 ELSE 200 END  )) END
			SET @A2=CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(10)',@BRK)) =0 THEN '' ELSE  (SELECT SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(10)',@BRK)+4,CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(10)',@BRK)+4,200))) > 0 THEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(10)',@BRK)+4,200))) -1 ELSE 200 END  )) END
			SET @A3=CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(11)',@BRK)) =0 THEN '' ELSE  (SELECT SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(11)',@BRK)+4,CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(11)',@BRK)+4,200))) > 0 THEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(11)',@BRK)+4,200))) -1 ELSE 200 END  )) END
			SET @A4=CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(17)',@BRK)) =0 THEN '' ELSE  (SELECT SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(17)',@BRK)+4,CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(17)',@BRK)+4,200))) > 0 THEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(17)',@BRK)+4,200))) -1 ELSE 200 END  )) END
			SET @A5=CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(21)',@BRK)) =0 THEN '' ELSE  (SELECT SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(21)',@BRK)+4,CASE WHEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(21)',@BRK)+4,200))) > 0 THEN (SELECT CHARINDEX('(',SUBSTRING(@BRK,CHARINDEX('(21)',@BRK)+4,200))) -1 ELSE 200 END  )) END 

		
			SET @BARKOD		= @A1
			SET @TAKIP_NO	= CASE WHEN LEN(@A5) = 0 THEN @A2 ELSE @A5 END
			SET @URTARIHI	= CASE WHEN LEN(@A3) = 0 THEN '' ELSE SUBSTRING(@A3,5,2)+'.'+SUBSTRING(@A3,3,2)+'.20'+SUBSTRING(@A3,1,2) END 
			SET @SKTARIHI	= CASE WHEN LEN(@A4) = 0 THEN '' ELSE SUBSTRING(@A4,5,2)+'.'+SUBSTRING(@A4,3,2)+'.20'+SUBSTRING(@A4,1,2) END
			SET @ALAN1		= CASE WHEN LEN(@A5) = 0 THEN '' ELSE @A2 END

			set @strx =''
			if ISNULL(@BARKOD,'')<>'' 
			BEGIN 
				SET @strx=@strx+''''+@BARKOD+''' AS BARKOD' 
			END

 			if ISNULL(@TAKIP_NO,'')<>'' 
			BEGIN 
				if LEN(@strx)>0 set @strx=@strx+','
				SET @strx=@strx+''''+@TAKIP_NO+''' AS TAKIP_NO'
			END
			if ISNULL(@URTARIHI,'')<>'' 
			BEGIN 
				if LEN(@strx)>0 set @strx=@strx+',' 
				SET @strx=@strx+''''+@URTARIHI+''' AS URTARIHI'
			END
			if ISNULL(@SKTARIHI,'')<>'' 
			BEGIN
				if LEN(@strx)>0 set @strx=@strx+','  
				SET @strx=@strx+''''+@SKTARIHI+''' AS SKTARIHI'
			END
			if ISNULL(@ALAN1,'')<>'' BEGIN 
				if LEN(@strx)>0 set @strx=@strx+','  
				SET @strx=@strx+''''+@ALAN1+''' AS ALAN1'
			END


			set @strx='SELECT '+ @strx
			EXEC sp_executesql @strx
